full_text:
Huang Yuan 黃元
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Huang Yuan (黃元). When Liu Bei became ill after Yiling, he rebelled. Defeated by Chen Hu. Huang Yuan was affiliated with the Shu Kingdom. Huang Yuan lived during the Three Kingdoms period of Chinese history.
